data.name: Error.PaginationPageIndexInvalid
data.value: Page index must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Error.PaginationPageSizeInvalid
data.value: Page size must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error.PaginationTotalCountInvalid
data.value: Total count must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Error.CategoryCircularRelationship
data.value: Category '{0}' and category '{1}' are in a circular relationship.

data.name: Error.UnitMeasurementNameExists
data.value: Unit of measurement name already exists.

data.name: Error.UnitMeasurementNameAlreadyExists
data.value: Unit of measurement name already exists.

data.name: Error.StockNotFound
data.value: Stock not found for product '{0}' in warehouse '{1}'.

data.name: Error.StockQuantityMustBePositive
data.value: Stock quantity must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error.InsufficientStock
data.value: Insufficient stock for product '{0}' in warehouse '{1}'. Required: {2}, available: {3}.

data.name: Error.CannotReleaseMoreThanReserved
data.value: Cannot release more than reserved quantity. Reserved: {0}, requested: {1}.

data.name: Error.CustomerCannotBeDeleted
data.value: Customer cannot be deleted because they have existing orders.

data.name: Error.OrderItemRequired
data.value: Order must have at least one item.

data.name: Error.OrderCannotLock
data.value: Order cannot be locked at current state.

data.name: Error.DeliveryNoteItemRequired
data.value: Delivery note must have at least one valid item.

data.name: Error.DeliveryNoteCreateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the delivery note.

data.name: Error.OrderCannotChangeStatus
data.value: Order cannot change status at current state.

data.name: Error.OrderCannotUpdateInfo
data.value: Order information cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.OrderCannotUpdateOrderItems
data.value: Order items cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.OrderDiscountExceedsTotal
data.value: Order discount cannot exceed the total amount.

data.name: Error.OrderItemAlreadyDelivered
data.value: Order item has already been delivered.

data.name: Error.OrderItemQuantityMustBePositive
data.value: Order item quantity must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error.OrderItemUnitPriceCannotBeNegative
data.value: Order item unit price cannot be negative.

data.name: Error.OrderItemQuantityInvalid_Delivering
data.value: Updated order item quantity cannot less than its delivering quantity.

data.name: Error.OrderItemUnitPriceCannotChange_InDelivery
data.value: Updated order item cannot change unit price of items that are already in delivery notes.

data.name: Error.OrderItemCannotRemove_InDelivery
data.value: Order item cannot be removed because it is processing in delivery note.

data.name: Error.OrderCannotDelete_Processing
data.value: Order cannot be deleted because it is being processed.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotSubmit
data.value: Purchase order cannot be submitted at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotCancel
data.value: Purchase order cannot be cancelled at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateInfo
data.value: Purchase order information cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateVendor
data.value: Purchase order vendor cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateWarehouse
data.value: Purchase order warehouse cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateDeliveryDate
data.value: Purchase order delivery date cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderHasNoItemsForShipping
data.value: Purchase order has no items to apply shipping amount.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderHasNoItemsForTax
data.value: Purchase order has no items to apply tax amount.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotAddItems
data.value: Cannot add items to purchase order with status {0}.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotReceiveGoods
data.value: Cannot receive goods to purchase order {0}.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderItemIsNotFound
data.value: Purchase order item with ID {0} not found in purchase order {1}.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderReceiveQuantityExceedsOrdered
data.value: Cannot receive quantity {0} because it exceeds the ordered quantity.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotDeleteItems
data.value: Can only delete items from purchase orders in Draft status.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotSubmit
data.value: Purchase order cannot be submitted at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotCancel
data.value: Purchase order cannot be cancelled at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotChangeStatus
data.value: Purchase order cannot change status at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotReceiveGoods
data.value: Purchase order cannot receive goods at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateInfo
data.value: Purchase order information cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateVendor
data.value: Vendor cannot be changed at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateWarehouse
data.value: Warehouse cannot be changed at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateDeliveryDate
data.value: Delivery date cannot be changed at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotUpdateOrderItems
data.value: Purchase order items cannot be updated at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderCannotAddItem
data.value: Cannot add items to purchase order at current state.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderHasNoItemsForShipping
data.value: Purchase order has no items. Cannot set shipping fee.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderHasNoItemsForTax
data.value: Purchase order has no items. Cannot set tax amount.

data.name: Error.PurchaseOrderReceiveQuantityExceedsOrderedQuantity
data.value: Receive quantity exceeds the ordered quantity.

data.name: Error.ExpectedDeliveryDateCannotBeInPast
data.value: Expected delivery date cannot be in the past.

data.name: Error.DeliveryNoteCannotChangeStatus
data.value: Delivery note cannot change status from '{0}' to '{1}'.

data.name: Error.ExpenseTitleTooLong
data.value: Expense title is too long (maximum 255 characters).

data.name: Error.ExpenseAmountMustBePositive
data.value: Expense amount must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error.VendorDebtAlreadyExistsForPurchaseOrderException
data.value: Vendor debt already exists for this purchase order.

data.name: Error.UserRegistrationDisabled
data.value: User registration is not allowed at this time.

data.name: Error.PaymentAmountMustBePositive
data.value: Payment amount must be greater than 0.

data.name: Error.DeliveryNoteItemsRequired
data.value: At least one item is required for the delivery note.

data.name: Error.DeliveryNoteQuantityMustBePositive
data.value: All delivery note items must have a quantity greater than 0.

data.name: Error.AmountToCollectCannotBeNegative
data.value: Amount to collect cannot be negative.
